# Inkspirations Studios Portfolio

> AI-readable access file for ChatGPT and other assistants.

Public portfolio URL: https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/
Artist: Robert Marleton
Studio: Inkspirations Studios
Focus: digital artwork, hand-lettering, ocean-inspired creative systems, music rooms, and interactive studio environments.

## How to access

Use the public homepage at https://rm337.github.io/markdown-portfolio/. The visual portfolio is embedded in the page for reliable GitHub Pages display. This file provides a clean text summary for assistants that cannot efficiently parse large embedded image data.

## Selected Portfolio Pieces

1. Infinite Love Study
   Type: Lettering
   Description: A saturated hand-lettering piece built from glow, texture, and motion.

2. Do Not Despair
   Type: Wood / Texture
   Description: A circular wood-texture statement piece with burned, stamped energy.

3. Sunflower Mandala
   Type: Pattern Work
   Description: A high-energy blue and gold mandala composition.

4. Blue Field Study
   Type: Texture Study
   Description: A close blue surface study with pencil-like grain and movement.

5. Love Texture Panel
   Type: Mixed Media
   Description: A distressed teal and red love study with print-like surface tension.

6. You Are Priceless
   Type: Lettering
   Description: A warm script study with a direct emotional message.

7. Red Motion Panel
   Type: Texture Study
   Description: A horizontal motion piece with intense red texture and velocity.

8. Rainline Study
   Type: Ink Study
   Description: Vertical color marks that read like weather, rhythm, and notation.

9. Infinite Love Variation
   Type: Lettering
   Description: A softer blue-violet pass on the same emotional mark.

10. Blue Name Current
   Type: Texture Study
   Description: Layered blue surface work with a quiet signature inside the field.

11. Blessed Water
   Type: Lettering
   Description: A gentle script piece carried by blue wash and open space.

12. Soul Current
   Type: Ink Study
   Description: A restrained blue field where the lettering dissolves into the surface.

13. Washed Out
   Type: Lettering
   Description: Expressive lettering across a bright digital wash.

14. Inkspirations Mark
   Type: Brand Mark
   Description: A blue hand-drawn studio mark that anchors the identity system.

15. Lest We Forget
   Type: Digital Collage
   Description: A compact memorial-style collage with distressed color and light.

16. Studio Blue Card
   Type: Identity Design
   Description: A polished Inkspirations Studios identity card in the house blue.

17. Inkspirations Logo Card
   Type: Identity Design
   Description: A clean studio logo lockup with calligraphic emphasis.

18. Say No Poster
   Type: Typography
   Description: A stark typographic poster study using scale, contrast, and compression.

19. Small Town Teacher
   Type: Identity Design
   Description: A compact identity mark with playful typography and a warm palette.

## Contact

Portfolio inquiries: r.marleton@gmail.com
